---
title: "Lecture 5 Quiz: HTML Lists & Images"
jupyter: julia-1.12
---

::: {.callout-note}
Review before quiz:
[Lectures](/lectures/lecture-05.qmd) | [Week 2 Content](/content/week-02.qmd) | [Lab 2](/labs/lab-02.qmd) | [Assignment 1](/assignment/01-assignment.qmd)
:::

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
using QuizQuestions
```

## Lecture 5 Self-Check

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. <ol>", "B. <ul>", "C. <dl>", "D. <li>"]
question = "Question 1: Which tag creates an unordered list with bullet points?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. <li>", "B. <dd>", "C. <dt>", "D. <img>"]
question = "Question 2: In a description list, which tag is used for the term itself?"
answer = 3
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `href`", "B. `src`", "C. `id`", "D. `class`"]
question = "Question 3: Which attribute is required to specify the image file path in `<img>`?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. It sets the image size", "B. It adds animation", "C. It improves accessibility and fallback text", "D. It changes image format"]
question = "Question 4: Why is the `alt` attribute important for images?"
answer = 3
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. JPG", "B. PNG", "C. SVG", "D. TXT"]
question = "Question 5: Which format is a scalable vector image format?"
answer = 3
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```
